title: Gilded Shadow
description: Darkness with a touch of gold.
body:
### _NOTE: The pack is not abandoned, I am just busy._

**This pack gives your GUI a sleek, dark aesthetic with golden accents. Perfect for players who want a moody but refined look.**

![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7bd3cdf577f98ca8963860692e143a61b9e466a.png)

**✨ Features**

- Dark & gold GUI redesign
- Custom inventory, hotbar, containers, and menus
- Clean buttons, highlights, and tooltips
- Fully compatible with 1.21.8+
